title: ophioglossum vulgatum var. macrorrhizum
intro: Ophioglossum vulgatum var. macrorrhizum, also known as the common adder's tongue fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Ophioglossaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Ophioglossum vulgatum var. macrorrhizum are typically made by drying and processing the roots and rhizomes, which can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture.
